text.p: Thanks for that quick response. I will try the number tomorrow. I will be away from for the rest of thisd week. I have a conference at UI. I also believe we should all meet physically soon. I really look forward to that.

Happy New Year to you and family. Thanks for the card. May the Lord's peace, joy, mercy, favour and grace increase upon you n fmily fmily this year, all the lord has for you will come unhindered in Jesus name.
Thanks for your letter. Thanks also for accepting my abstract. Please I wish to add that both my title and abstract have been modified very slightly.

The abstract has been restructured to fully reflect the content of the paper. Please accommodate these minor modifications. I earlier posted three hard copies of the paper, but I have taken note of the requirements for the conference. Find attached the full paper as directed.
By God’s will, I will be at the Canaanland, come June.
